description: Create a 'Picture-in-Picture' news broadcast layout using the animation sample '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' and the background image '/home/ga/Documents/TaskData/city_background.jpg'. Set the output resolution to 1920x1080 and composite the scene so the city background covers the screen while the 'dwanko' animation plays within a 'Live Feed' box in the top-right quadrant (scaled to approximately 40-50%). Ensure the bottom-left quadrant remains clear. Render at least 24 frames as PNG files to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/news_pip/'.
